name: Herbed Venison & Mushroom
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet; add mushrooms and onions and sauté until tender.
2. Place mushrooms and onions in a shallow, 2-quart casserole and set aside.
3. Combine flour, salt, paprika, and pepper; dredge venison in the flour mixture.
4. Melt butter in a skillet; add venison and brown well.
5. Place venison over onions and mushrooms in the casserole.
6. Top with garlic and rosemary.
7. Pour beef stock over top.
8. Loosen browned particles from the skillet and add to the casserole.
9. Cover and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
10. Serve sauce in gravy boat.
